ITEM: Mersey Point Jetty Design (PAGE 1)
- Design Life: 50 years
- Annual Probability of Design Wave Event: 1/500
- Deck Load Class: 5 (Pedestrian Crowd)
- Uniformly Distributed Load (Main Jetty): 5 kPa
- Point Load (Main Jetty): 13 kN at 1.8 m centers
- Uniformly Distributed Load (Low Level Landing): 5 kPa
- Point Load (Low Level Landing): 4.5 kN at 1.8 m centers
- Design Vessel Max Displacement: 15 tonnes
- Max Berthing Velocity: 0.30 m/s
- Max Wind Speed When Vessel Berthed: 22.1 m/s (30s duration)
- Max Wave Height When Vessel Berthed: 0.90 m
- Tidal Levels: HAT 0.58 mAHD, MHHW 0.20 mAHD, MSL -0.01 mAHD, MLLW -0.23 mAHD, LAT -0.56 mAHD, CD -0.76 mAHD

ITEM: Concrete Deck & Headstock Layout (PAGE 3)
- Cover: 65 mm minimum
- Reinforcement: N16-LL, N24-LL, N32-LL
- Headstock Type: Variations A, B, C, D, E, F
- Deck Panel Type: Variations 1, 1a, 1b, 1c, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7a, 8

Relevant to the description as it details the deck panel types and quantities needed for the layout.
ITEM: Concrete Details (PAGE 4)
- Pile Cap Plan: 1:10 scale
- Pile Connection Void: Rough exposed aggregate finish
- Reinforcement: 8xN28 cage, 8xN24 cage, 6xN24 rods
- Concrete Mix: SC50 for void filling
- Bolt Details: 4 x M20 bolts, 350 mm P.C.D.

ITEM: Low Level Landing Layout (PAGE 5)
- Member Schedule: H1 (300x200x8), S1 (250x150x6), B1 (100x50x6)
- Kerb: To all edges except ladder location and access to main jetty

ITEM: Low Level Landing Details (PAGE 6)
- Headstock Connection: 20 PL with 2xM28 SS threaded rods, min 200 mm embedment
- FRP Grating: 38 mm
- Ladder: 40 NB galvanized pipe, bottom rung below -0.9 mAHD
- Fender: Trelleborg DC-200

ITEM: Mersey Point Jetty Design (PAGE 1)
- Design Life: 50 years
- Annual Probability of Design Wave Event: 1/500
- Deck Load Class: 5 (Pedestrian Crowd)
- Uniformly Distributed Load (Main Jetty): 5 kPa
- Point Load (Main Jetty): 13 kN at 1.8 m centers
- Uniformly Distributed Load (Low Level Landing): 5 kPa
- Point Load (Low Level Landing): 4.5 kN at 1.8 m centers
- Design Vessel Max Displacement: 15 tonnes
- Max Berthing Velocity: 0.30 m/s
- Max Wind Speed When Vessel Berthed: 22.1 m/s (30s duration)
- Max Wave Height When Vessel Berthed: 0.90 m
- Tidal Levels: HAT 0.58 mAHD, MHHW 0.20 mAHD, MSL -0.01 mAHD, MLLW -0.23 mAHD, LAT -0.56 mAHD, CD -0.76 mAHD

- Pile Cap Plan: 1:10 scale
- Pile Connection Void: Rough exposed aggregate finish

ITEM: Low Level Landing Layout (PAGE 5)
